title: Smoky Roasted Ethiopian Dried Cranberries Stir-fry
description: A tender and umami-rich dish featuring ethiopian spices and low-sodium-friendly bhuna sauce with dried cranberries, perfect for a sick-day meal.

ingredients.name: 10 dried cranberries, soaked in hot water for 5 minutes

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add minced garlic and red bell pepper; sauté for another 2-3 minutes.
Stir in soaked dried cranberries and vegetable broth. Bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover and simmer for about 10 minutes.
Add cumin, smoked paprika, coriander, turmeric, salt, and pepper; stir well.
Simmer for an additional 5-7 minutes until slightly thickened.
Serve hot as a side dish or over rice.
